title: draba incana var. hebecarpa
intro: Draba incana var. hebecarpa is a variant of the Draba incana plant, also known as the Alpine Whitlow Grass or Alpine Draba, which is a small, perennial plant belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Draba incana var. hebecarpa include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as reducing inflammation and fever. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
